mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, password, name, created_at, ip_address ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, SYSDATE, #{ipAddress} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, password, name, created_at, ip_address FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id, password, name, created_at, ip_address FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC, user_id ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
password = #{password},
name = #{name},
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
